title: Welcome to Dr. Mehrotra's Dental and Implant Center - Making Lucknow's smile more beautiful! Highest quality Dental Implants in Lucknow at an affordable price - Home
description: Dr. Mehrotra Dental and Implant Center in Hazratganj, Lucknow offers advanced dental care, cosmetic dentistry, RCT, and dental implants with a focus on comfort and precision. Conveniently located on Vidhan Sabha Marg, we provide expert oral surgery
text: Welcome to Dr. Mehrotra's Dental and Implant Center - Making Lucknow's smile more beautiful! Highest quality Dental Implants in Lucknow at an affordable price - Home Welcome to Dr. Mehrotra's Dental and Implant Center - Making Lucknow's smile more beautiful! Highest quality Dental Implants in Lucknow at an affordable price Follow us Home Dental Implant Informational Videos Our Team Contact Us Patient Testimonials Dental Tourism Before and After your Visit Latest Updates in Dental Field One stop for all your dental needs! Located in the heart of Hazratganj, our practice was established in 1954 by Dr. Prakash Narayan Mehrotra. For over 60 years we have been providing cutting edge dental care for the city of nawabs. Currently owned and run by his son, Dr. Nikhil Mehrotra (MBBS, BDS, MDS-Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Implantologist), our practice offers complete dental solutions for all age groups, with special emphasis on implant surgery and implant supported prosthetic tooth replacements. Call now for a consultation appointment at +91 - 9336672575 Creating beautiful smiles for one and all... Services offered Preventive & Diagnostic Cleaning (Dental Prophylaxis) using latest Ultrasonic equipment Dental X-Rays Surgical All on 4 Full mouth restoration Dental Implants - Single tooth to full mouth Restoration using Neodent and Nobel Biocare Implant System (World's 2 biggest Implant companies) Wisdom tooth extraction using latest surgical handpiece Surgical Dental Extractions Bone grafting for Dental implants Post Core and Crown Dentures Bridge work Restorative Tooth colored esthetic fillings Root Canal Treatment using latest rotary technology Orthodontic Braces for crooked teeth Dental Tourism We offer complete dental care for overseas patients seeking excellent and affordable dental treatment. We have ties with a hotel chain and can arrange for your entire stay including your dental treatment during your visit to the city of nawabs! Do call us to receive a customized package designed exactly as per your needs! Ideal combination of dental treatment and leisure!
